caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold, and a gold chain is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him and wears black headphones. In the background, a white wall features a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE," while a blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black box with a red and white logo and a small blue container with red text that says "TALK OUT" are visible on the desk. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his head slightly from left to right and changing his facial expression as he talks into the microphone. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the waist up as he engages in a conversation.
